mapper.select: SELECT a.*, m.product_title, m.mch_id,m.status, c.id AS attribute_id, c.pid, c.price, c.img, c.num, c.unit, c.attribute, mc.is_open, mc.business_hours, m.recycle, m.write_off_settings FROM lkt_cart AS a LEFT JOIN lkt_product_list AS m ON a.Goods_id = m.id LEFT JOIN lkt_configure AS c ON a.Size_id = c.id LEFT JOIN lkt_mch AS mc ON m.mch_id = mc.id WHERE a.store_id = #{store_id} AND m.mch_status = 2 AND a.token = #{token} AND m. STATUS = 2 and m.recycle = 0 and m.recycle=c.recycle AND m.STATUS != 1 AND a.token = #{yk_token} AND a.user_id='' AND a.user_id = #{user_id} AND mc.is_open = 1 AND m.lang_code = #{lang_code} AND m.commodity_type = #{commodityType} ORDER BY a.Create_time DESC
